label: Interaction
description: Defines a social interaction that pawns can perform on one another, including the worker logic, grammar rules for the interaction log, optional mote effects, and XP or thought outcomes.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# InteractionWorker subclass that controls when this interaction fires and what it does. Defaults to the base InteractionWorker.

interactionMote.label: Interaction mote
interactionMote.description: ThingDef for the speech bubble mote spawned during the interaction. Defaults to Mote_Speech when omitted.

socialFightBaseChance.label: Social fight base chance
socialFightBaseChance.description: Base probability that this interaction triggers a social fight between the two pawns.

initiatorThought.label: Initiator thought
initiatorThought.description: ThoughtDef added to the initiating pawn's memory after this interaction.

initiatorXpGainSkill.label: Initiator XP gain skill
initiatorXpGainSkill.description: SkillDef that the initiating pawn gains XP in when this interaction fires.

initiatorXpGainAmount.label: Initiator XP gain amount
initiatorXpGainAmount.description: Amount of XP the initiating pawn gains in initiatorXpGainSkill.

recipientThought.label: Recipient thought
recipientThought.description: ThoughtDef added to the receiving pawn's memory after this interaction.

recipientXpGainSkill.label: Recipient XP gain skill
recipientXpGainSkill.description: SkillDef that the receiving pawn gains XP in when this interaction fires.

recipientXpGainAmount.label: Recipient XP gain amount
recipientXpGainAmount.description: Amount of XP the receiving pawn gains in recipientXpGainSkill.

ignoreTimeSinceLastInteraction.label: Ignore time since last interaction
ignoreTimeSinceLastInteraction.description: If true, the normal cooldown preventing repeated interactions is bypassed for this interaction type.

symbol.label: Symbol
symbol.description: Texture path for the interaction icon shown in the social tab and interaction log. Not translated.

symbolSource.label: Symbol source
symbolSource.description: Where the interaction symbol is drawn from. Def uses the symbol field; InitiatorIdeo and InitiatorFaction pull the icon from the initiating pawn's ideology or faction.

logRulesInitiator.label: Log rules (initiator)
logRulesInitiator.description: Grammar rules for generating the interaction log entry from the initiating pawn's perspective.

logRulesRecipient.label: Log rules (recipient)
logRulesRecipient.description: Grammar rules for generating the interaction log entry from the receiving pawn's perspective.

basic-interaction.label: Basic interaction
basic-interaction.description: Minimal social interaction with a symbol and initiator log rules.

skill-interaction.label: Skill-training interaction
skill-interaction.description: Social interaction that grants XP and optionally a thought to both participants.
